name: Standard work observation sheet
description: Short observation sheet for tracking whether critical service standards are actually being executed, coached, and reinforced in live service.
source_ref: core-v2: standardization depends on visible observation, not memory of training
usage_moment: Use during live service when checking a small set of critical standards and coaching misses.
expected_output: A short record of observed standards, misses, coaching actions, and repeated drift patterns.
